prestazioni: N52B30 (3.0L naturally aspirated inline-6) forced induction via Pure Stage 2 turbo kit with Garrett GT3076R turbocharger, custom 3.5" V-band downpipe, and CSF intercooler with 500whp-capable fueling (HPFP upgrade + port injection via Fuel-It Stage 3 kit with dual 450LPH pumps)

MCS 2-way adjustable coilovers with remote reservoirs, custom valving for F10 chassis, and Swift Springs 8K/10K spring rates paired with Ohlins TTX40 dampers for track-focused rebound/compression tuning
Brembo GT 6-piston front (380mm) and 4-piston rear (355mm) big brake kit with 2-piece floating rotors, Pagid RSL29 brake pads, and Motul RBF660 brake fluid for fade resistance under 1.5g deceleration
estetica: 3D Design F10-specific GT4-style front bumper with integrated carbon fiber splitter and canards, paired with a custom carbon fiber rear diffuser from Vorsteiner (F10-specific fitment) and a 3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap with satin accents

OEM+ M Performance carbon fiber kidney grilles, side gills, and mirror caps, combined with a custom rear spoiler from AC Schnitzer (Type IV, 30mm height adjustment) and HRE FF01 wheels (19x9.5 ET30 front, 19x11 ET45 rear) in matte bronze with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear)

Full interior carbon fiber trim kit from BMW Individual (door cards, center console, dashboard) with Alcantara headliner, custom Recaro SPG XL seats (F10-specific mounting brackets), and a MOTEC C127 dash display replacing the stock instrument cluster
